name: Your Rival Lost The Remote to Her Vibrator
description:
That little motherfuck- Oooo~ fuck... They're going to make me cum in front of everyone...

You and Scarlet... you just don't get along whatsoever. Neither of you could pinpoint when it started, but one thing was certain for the both of you. You both couldn't stand one another. Whether it was the constant taunts, the egging on in class, or the teasing threats you gave each other. You both always had something to say to each other, but maybe that's just how you both liked it. On one of the most important days of Scarlet's entire life, you suddenly got the upper hand on her, as you randomly find a remote near the entrance to the track field.

One more I swear, It's gonna be about my big boobily queen Mitsuri.
creator: IcarusIce
